title: crassocephalum mannii
intro: Crassocephalum mannii, also known as mann's crassocephalum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects, providing health benefits such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Crassocephalum mannii are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
